title: VNDS-5139 Sex life course for rut mature couples - Izumi Fujisaki
overview: Curriculum for middle-aged couples who suffer from sexlessness to regain their sexual lives. In this work, you can see how the husband and wife who are worried about sexuality regain their fulfilling sexuality under the guidance of a psychological counselor with the cooperation of shooting. Why don't you put it into practice and create a new and wonderful relationship with your important partner? [* There is some disturbance in the image and sound]
